pi_items.source: Task specification - user-defined parameter for what should be created
iDempiere API documentation (X_C_RevenueRecognition class) - M represents Month frequency option

iDempiere database storage convention (IDEMPIERE-2477) - Boolean fields stored as Y/N in database; API documentation confirms IsTimeBased is a boolean field meaning 'Time based Revenue Recognition rather than Service Level based'
Task specification - user-defined parameter for required description text

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the GardenWorld synthetic demo client in iDempiere, a real open-source ERP system. It creates a Revenue Recognition Rule (C_RevenueRecognition table record) with the name '12 Month Subscription', time-based recognition enabled (stored as 'Y' in database), monthly frequency (code 'M'), and a description containing 'Ratable recognition'. All metadata field codes (M for Month, Y for Yes) are verified against iDempiere's official API documentation and database storage conventions.
